# The Berman Group вАФ Energy Rating Platform

> The Berman Group operates three multi-tenant energy certification platforms across Europe: The Berman (Ireland), EPC Cert (England), and Certificado Energ√©tico (Spain). Each platform connects homeowners and businesses with registered energy assessors for fast, reliable energy rating certificates.

## Overview

- **Ireland**: The Berman вАФ Building Energy Rating (BER) certificates and SEAI-registered assessors.
- **England**: EPC Cert вАФ Energy Performance Certificates (EPC) and accredited assessors nationwide.
- **Spain**: Certificado Energ√©tico вАФ Certificados de Eficiencia Energ√©tica (CEE) and certificadores acreditados.

## Platform Structure

### Public Pages
- `/` вАФ Homepage with hero, search, and assessor directory
- `/about` вАФ Company story, mission, and team
- `/services` вАФ Energy rating services offered
- `/pricing` вАФ Transparent pricing information
- `/contact-us` вАФ Contact form and support
- `/catalogue` вАФ Business and assessor directory
- `/locations` вАФ County and town landing pages
- `/faq` вАФ Frequently asked questions
- `/news` вАФ Industry news and updates
- `/blog` вАФ Educational articles on energy efficiency
- `/hire-agent` вАФ Book an assessor directly
- `/get-quote` вАФ Request a quote for assessment

### User Pages
- `/login` вАФ Account login
- `/signup` вАФ User registration
- `/dashboard/user` вАФ Homeowner dashboard
- `/dashboard/ber-assessor` вАФ Assessor dashboard
- `/dashboard/business` вАФ Business partner dashboard
- `/forgot-password` вАФ Password recovery
- `/update-password` вАФ Password reset

## Technical Stack

- **Frontend**: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Edge Functions)
- **Payments**: Stripe
- **Maps**: Leaflet with OpenStreetMap
- **SEO**: react-helmet-async, prerendered static HTML, JSON-LD schema
- **Hosting**: Vercel with SPA routing and static file serving
- **Domains**:
  - `theberman.eu` (Ireland)
  - `epccert.com` (England)
  - `certificadoenerg√©tico.eu` (Spain)

## Key Features

- Multi-tenant architecture with domain-based tenant detection
- Automated quote matching between homeowners and assessors
- Subscription-based assessor and business memberships
- Job board with SMS and email notifications
- Payment processing via Stripe
- Contact form with SMTP email delivery per tenant
- Google Analytics and Tag Manager integration

## Contact

- **Ireland**: hello@theberman.eu
- **England**: hello@epccert.com
- **Spain**: hello@certificadosenergetico.es
